title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at DB Schenker India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at DB Schenker India
jsonLd.description:
DB Schenker India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Hyderabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DB Schenker India:
DB Schenker India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DB Schenker India!
